evidence_summary: Establish the protagonist's physical disorientation and the alien low-gravity environment through clumsy, uncontrolled movement within a Martian basin.
The protagonist wakes up on Mars, naked and disoriented. He discovers that the low gravity makes normal movement impossible, causing him to leap uncontrollably with every step.
protagonist lying naked and motionless in the moss.
protagonist leaping uncontrollably across the basin floor.
The transition from waking up to discovering uncontrollable low-gravity leaps.
